positive: A whimsical and stylized geometric pattern featuring interlocking constellations and mythical woodland creatures like stylized foxes, bears, and deer, rendered in deep midnight blue and ethereal gold foil tones. The design should be highly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating seamless textile pattern, with clean, crisp lines and strong silhouettes. Incorporate delicate celestial elements such as crescent moons, stylized stars, and nebulas, creating a sense of magical mystery. The overall composition must be central, highly detailed, and visually balanced, maintaining a flat, graphic print-ready quality with clear delineation between colored areas and background, reminiscent of Art Deco engraving meets modern kawaii style. Optimal composition for wearable art.
negative: blurry, realistic, 3d render, low contrast, messy, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, cropped, muted colors
